sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 24:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 24:1
items.html: Malchut of Rosh is called Peh, and the ten Sefirot that pass through her downwards by the sparkling of the screen are called speech. This is how the lights are always imparted and pass from Partzuf to Partzuf. (Part 3, Chapter 11, item 2)
